title: Device Home Screen - Power on Headset while in the app
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app UI does not update to show headset as connected when paired device is powered on while app is open
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is already paired with the Android device but currently powered OFF.
3. Observe the Home screen of the app — the headset should appear in the device list with a 'Disconnected' or 'Not Connected' status.
4. Power ON the paired Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button until the LED indicates power-on).
5. Wait for the headset to automatically reconnect to the Android device via Bluetooth.
6. Observe the Home screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app for the device status update.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen updates to show the headset as 'Connected' (e.g., device name appears with a connected status indicator).
